KeysToEntries.Ammo_Sp_222_Description: This is a 55-grain soft-point hunting cartridge with a lead core and partial jacket, which allows controlled expansion and effective penetration. It features a brass case, boxer primer, and is reloadable.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_Hp_222_Description: This 52-grain, hollow-point, boat-tail cartridge is designed for maximum precision and stability. Its streamlined shape enhances aerodynamics and maintains energy over distance. It features a brass case and a boxer primer. It is fully reloadable.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_FMJ_222_Description: This 50-grain, full-metal-jacket cartridge is designed for accuracy and consistency. Its lead core and durable copper jacket ensure stable flight and minimal deformation. The cartridge provides a flat trajectory and reliable performance. Loaded in high-quality brass cases with boxer primers, it is fully reloadable and ensures dependable function.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_VMax_222_Description: This 50-grain, polymer-tipped bullet features a streamlined V-MAX design that enables explosive energy transfer. The high-precision brass case is boxer-primed and reloadable. It offers a flatter trajectory, superior wind resistance, and maximum terminal performance.
